kcgf.name: K.C. Gupta Fellow (KCGF) — Corpus Fund
kcgf.summary: A corpus fund created to meet the educational needs of poor students through financial assistance, distribution of notebooks, and other support.
kcgf.description:
KCGF is a permanent corpus fund. Contribution amounts are deposited under fixed deposits in banks; only the interest earned is utilised to support education — notebooks, fees, and emergency student aid across the Vasavi community.

HotelHub donor tiers (Bronze through Platinum) are aligned with KCGF contribution levels. Your hospitality donations directly strengthen this corpus while unlocking exclusive stays and discounts.
kcgf.hotelBenefit: Donor tier discounts of 10%–50% on all HotelHub properties

vksp.name: Vasavi Kutumba Suraksha Padhakam (VKSP)
vksp.summary: A benevolent fund for members of Vasavi Clubs International in good standing.
vksp.description:
VKSP provides family security and welfare support to Vasavi Club members. Any member from any club in good standing is eligible to join this fund.

HotelHub guests who are verified VKSP members may link their membership in the donor portal for combined welfare and booking benefits.
vksp.hotelBenefit: Priority check-in and member recognition at all eleven hotels

vasavi-saraswathi.name: Vasavi Saraswathi Padhakam
vasavi-saraswathi.summary: Educational support funded by KCGF interest — supporting students in times of need.
vasavi-saraswathi.description:
KCGF contributions are deposited permanently under FDs in banks from day one. Only the interest earned is utilised during times of natural calamities and educational emergencies.

A portion of HotelHub community donations is earmarked for Saraswathi Padhakam initiatives at each property.
vasavi-saraswathi.hotelBenefit: Annual educational outreach events hosted at partner hotels

self-employment.name: Vasavi Self Employment Scheme
self-employment.summary: Interest-free loans of ₹20,000 to economically backward families to start or improve business (since 2004–05).
self-employment.description:
Introduced in 2004–05 to provide self-employment to economically backward families with ₹20,000 as interest-free loans to start a business or improve an existing one.

HotelHub's Sreyobhilashi-aligned giving channel routes select donations toward micro-enterprise support in communities surrounding our hotels.
self-employment.hotelBenefit: Local artisan and vendor partnerships at hotel properties

sreyobhilashi.name: Sreyobhilashi Scheme
sreyobhilashi.summary: Donation-driven self-employment loans for economically backward families (since 2019).
sreyobhilashi.description:
Considering requests from Vasavians, Sreyobhilashi was introduced in 2019 to provide self-employment support through community donations to economically backward families.

HotelHub donors may designate contributions to Sreyobhilashi when completing a donation on the Donor Program page.
sreyobhilashi.hotelBenefit: Named recognition in annual community impact report

vksp-senior.name: Vasavi Kutumba Suraksha Padhakam (Senior)
vksp-senior.summary: Extended benevolent coverage for senior members and their families.
vksp-senior.description:
VKSP Senior extends the Vasavi Kutumba Suraksha Padhakam framework to senior members, ensuring dignity and support in later years.

Senior Vasavi members receive complimentary late checkout and priority room allocation when booking through HotelHub.
vksp-senior.hotelBenefit: Senior-friendly rooms and assistance at all properties

standardNonAc.name: Standard Non-AC
standardNonAc.description: Simple, clean room with twin beds and a fan. Ideal for single pilgrims or couples on a budget darshan trip.

standardAc.name: Standard AC
standardAc.description: Comfortable air-conditioned room with attached bath. Perfect for families seeking rest after temple visits.

familyRoom.name: Family Room
familyRoom.description: Spacious room with multiple beds, perfect for families traveling together for Darshan.

donorAcRoom.name: Donor AC Room
donorAcRoom.description: Reserved AC accommodation for our community donors.

penthouseSuite.name: Penthouse Suite
penthouseSuite.description: Premium top-floor suite with panoramic views and dedicated seva desk.

vasavi-nityannadana-residency-hyderabad.name: Sri Vasavi Nityannadana Residency
vasavi-nityannadana-residency-hyderabad.description: A premium heritage-style hotel designed for families and corporate visitors of the Vysya community. Offering traditional Satvik dining, luxury suites, and elegant prayer halls near the heritage markets.

tirumala-venkateswara-stay.name: Sri Venkateswara Pilgrim Stay
tirumala-venkateswara-stay.description: Affordable and highly trusted accommodations near Tirumala foothills. Offers special counters for Darshan guidance, community kitchens, and free bus shuttles to Alipiri.

vasavi-kanyaka-grand-vijayawada.name: Sri Vasavi Kanyaka Grand
vasavi-kanyaka-grand-vijayawada.description: Overlooking the beautiful Krishna River and near the sacred Kanaka Durga Temple. A luxury traditional hotel offering spiritual suites, pure Satvik food, and community congregation halls.

vizag-ocean-view-retreat.name: Vizag Ocean View Vasavi Retreat
vizag-ocean-view-retreat.description: A clean, family-friendly hotel facing the scenic RK Beach. Melding coastal wellness with rich South Indian cultural aesthetics, perfect for weekend pilgrim getaways.

bengaluru-vasavi-royal-heritage.name: Bengaluru Vasavi Royal Heritage
bengaluru-vasavi-royal-heritage.description: Located near traditional business hubs, offering majestic rosewood interiors and traditional South Indian temple architecture coupled with elite donor suites.

chennai-kanyaka-parameswari-lodge.name: Chennai Kanyaka Parameswari Lodge
chennai-kanyaka-parameswari-lodge.description: Located in the bustling heritage streets of George Town, this lodge provides sacred comfort, traditional pure-vegetarian catering, and proximity to local temples.

srisailam-mallikarjuna-retreat.name: Srisailam Mallikarjuna Devotee Stay
srisailam-mallikarjuna-retreat.description: A calm devotional guest property amidst the sacred forests. Connect with Lord Shiva in absolute spiritual peace with basic, clean amenities for pilgrims.

warangal-bhadrakali-niwas.name: Warangal Vasavi Bhadrakali Niwas
warangal-bhadrakali-niwas.description: Exquisite hotel highlighting the Kakatiya stone art aesthetics, located adjacent to the ancient Bhadrakali Temple. Enjoy peaceful chanting views and traditional community dining.

rajahmundry-vasavi-godavari-sadan.name: Rajahmundry Vasavi Godavari Sadan
rajahmundry-vasavi-godavari-sadan.description: Perfect for families coming for Pushkaram ghat rituals. Enjoy panoramic river views, clean marble-floored AC rooms, and pure Satvik meals cooked by community chefs.

kakinada-vasavi-grand.name: Kakinada Vasavi Grand Stay
kakinada-vasavi-grand.description: A modern-traditional business and pilgrim hybrid hotel in the heart of Kakinada, popular for its rich Andhra-style hospitality, warm interiors, and spacious community function halls.

mysore-vasavi-chamundeshwari-palace.name: Mysore Vasavi Chamundeshwari Palace
mysore-vasavi-chamundeshwari-palace.description: A royal palace-inspired heritage stay located close to the Chamundi Hills. Embellished with beautiful traditional rosewood carvings, courtyard gardens, and spiritual luxury.

founder.title: Freedom Fighter & Founder of the Vasavi Movement
founder.bio:
A need was strongly felt to bring all Vysya Community to a common platform and to enable them to exchange ideas and views, and also to felicitate Arya Vysyas who were qualified as IAS, Doctors, Engineers, and Advocates, as well as those who visited foreign countries.

With these modest aims and objectives, the FIRST VASAVI CLUB was started on 1 October 1961 with eleven members at Hyderabad by Late Sri Kalvakuntla Chandrasena Gupta (K.C. Gupta), Freedom Fighter — regarded as not only the Founder but also the "Father of the Vasavi Movement."
founder.legacy: Today, Vasavi Clubs International spans hundreds of clubs across India and abroad. Vasavi Hotels extends this legacy of community, service, and fellowship through guest houses and pilgrim stays where members gather, celebrate, and give back.

booking.guestIntro: Guest details for temple-town check-in & WhatsApp confirmation.
booking.aadhaarHint: Enter 12 digits — shown as XXXX XXXX XXXX
booking.aadhaarInvalid: Enter all 12 digits of your Aadhaar number
booking.memberIntro: Verify your Vasavi Clubs International membership to unlock free stays, compensation wallet, festival coupons, and donor rewards.
booking.memberNotFound: Member ID not found. Try DH-2024-8842, VCI-HYD-2841, or VCI-SEC-1092
booking.noCoupons: No coupons in wallet. Visit Community Givers to earn blessings.
booking.rewardsHint: Verify your member ID on the previous step, or sign in at the donor portal to apply free stays and compensation credits.
booking.sevaDesc: Add a devotional contribution to the K.C. Gupta Fellow corpus. Your seva compounds community education while earning reward points.
booking.confirmBody: Your pilgrimage shelter at {{hotelName}} is reserved with Vasavi community blessings. May your journey be peaceful and fulfilling.
booking.qrHint: Express QR check-in at temple reception — contactless & warm welcome
booking.quote: In service to community, we find the divine.
booking.paymentPendingBody: Your reservation is held. Complete payment to confirm your stay.
booking.usingSearchDates: Using the dates from your search — no need to pick again.
booking.usingSavedProfile: Using your saved profile — guest details are already filled.
